name: FIRST REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT TRUST OF NEW JERSEY, INC.
business: First Real Estate Investment Trust of New Jersey, Inc. acquires, develops, constructs and holds real estate properties for long-term investment. Its properties include residential apartment communities and commercial properties in New Jersey and New York. The company generates revenue from rental income and related charges from tenants.

exposures.sentence: FREIT's developed properties include residential apartment communities and commercial properties that consist of multi and single tenanted properties.
retailers at FREIT's commercial properties face increasing competition from online shopping, outlet malls and discount shopping clubs.

We are exposed to various cybersecurity risks, including but not limited to: Data Breaches and Unauthorized Access: We collect, process, and store significant amounts of sensitive data, including Personally Identifiable Information (PII) of our tenants and employees.
